name: WebGPU 4-up (MPR + 3D)
desc: The Slicer-style 4-up, native in WebGPU — three MPR planes (windowed CT + colored segmentation overlay) + a 3D ColorizeVolume view, all from the same GPU textures. The replacement for the vtk.js 4-up. Scroll a slice to scrub; drag 3D to orbit.

name: WebGPU LiveRenderer (preview)
desc: NEW rendering backbone — a step-based volume ray-marcher in TypeScript/WebGPU, ported from slicer-wgpu, running the same code in the browser and natively under Deno. Drag to orbit. (Synthetic volume; the future replacement for the vtk.js path.)

name: WebGPU: multi-volume
desc: Native multivolume — two independent volumes composited in one ray-march via the field-based SceneRenderer (generated WGSL, per-sample OVER). The field spine that will carry segmentation + ColorizeVolume next. Drag to orbit.

name: WebGPU: ColorizeVolume (segmentation)
desc: A segmentation labelmap baked on the GPU into a smooth colored volume (palette → separable Gaussian → rgba16float) and ray-marched — the native replacement for surface models, and the exact path an interactive nnLive mask will take. Drag to orbit.

name: TotalSegmentator-CT
desc: NLST chest CT with 73 TotalSegmentator organ & bone segmentations (IDC) — 3D surfaces + colored MPR overlays

name: IDC: TotalSegmentator
desc: Streamed LIVE from the NCI IDC AWS bucket + parsed in your browser with dcmjs — NLST chest CT + 73 TotalSegmentator organ/bone segments. No server, no pre-processing (~150 MB, give it a moment).

name: MRHead
desc: MR head — volume rendering + 4-up (axial / sagittal / coronal)
